patch.value: CodeQL alert 30: polynomial ReDoS in shared path normalization primitive

GitHub CodeQL reports js/polynomial-redos at src/core/shared/primitives.ts:29 on main 221980a7. Replace the repetition-sensitive path normalization with a linear-time implementation and preserve cross-platform path semantics.

CodeQL alert 30 is fixed with a linear-time implementation; adversarial repeated-separator regression test passes; Windows and POSIX path behavior is unchanged; exact 100/100/100/100 coverage and security gates pass
